===How I Became a Pokémon Card===
[[File:Allergicrocket.png|thumb|200px|left|Erika with [[Kaede]] in [[How I Became a Pokémon Card]]]]
In [[How I Became a Pokémon Card]], Erika appears in ''[[PW08|Erika and Kaede... and Dark Gloom]]''. She is a childhood friend of [[Kaede]], a [[Team Rocket]] operative with allergies to flowers. As children, Erika would frequently give flowers to Kaede, misunderstanding her tears as tears of joy. The two reunited when Kaede invaded Erika's Gym on behalf of Team Rocket. Erika was overjoyed to see her dear friend again, either not realizing or not caring that Kaede joined Team Rocket. She excitedly shows Kaede her Vileplume, who had evolved between the time they last saw each other. This causes an extreme reaction in Kaede, causing her to fall to the floor in tears. Erika once again misunderstands this, believing Kaede's reaction if because of a deep love for flowers.
